title: Blinding Venom
text:
In close combat, a model with this biomorph can exchange all of its normal Attacks to make a single blinding venom attack, which uses the following profile:

||Range|S|AP|Type|h
|Blinding Venom | --- | 3 | --- |Melee, [[Blind]], [[Poisoned]] (6+)|
creator: Jeanbeaux
description: Some Tyranids spit caustic venom at their prey’s eyes.
